title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick — Page 6
raw_text:
"Tomorrow morning," he decided, "I'll begin clearing away the sand
of fifty
thousand centuries for my first vegetable garden. That's the initial
step."
—Philip K. Dick, The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch
What best can I do? Exactly what I've done. My voice for the
voiceless.
—Philip K. Dick, The Exegesis
work_title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick
